Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0028",
  "title": "游艺春秋",
  "page_index": 19,
  "page_range": "19-20"
}

Section text:
游艺春秋
论前期玩法验证测试：存量博弈时代的产品突围之道
进入2025年，全球游戏市场的增长虽见回暖，但整体已步入一个高质量、高成本、高风险的“深水区”。
在版号发放趋稳、出海规模持续扩大的同时，市场对产品的品质要求也达到了前所未有的高度。过去依赖
单一品类或买量策略的成功模式已难以为继，如何在激烈的存量博弈中突围，成为所有发行商与研发团队
的核心命题。我们认为，在产品立项的早期阶段，将资源集中于“前期玩法验证测试”，是当前市场环境下最为关键的决策。这不仅是为
了节省后续高昂的美术与内容制作成本，更是为了在产品投入大规模开发前，以数据为依据，科学地确认核心玩法的商业化潜力与用户
留存能力。
在当前“品类融合”与“题材差异化”成为主流趋势的背景下，游艺春秋认为，玩法验证的重要性被进一步放大。任何微创新或融合玩法的
尝试，都必须尽快通过最小可行产品进行市场检验。我们需要回答的核心问题是：玩家是否会为这个“核心循环”买单？这要求我们将测
试前置，在小范围内快速迭代，聚焦于留存等关键指标，并收集真实的用户反馈。面对动辄千万美金的研发成本， SLG、RPG等重度品
类已放弃“闭门造车”。通过剥离核心逻辑，制作具备原生表现力的小游戏版本进行前期测试，已成为标准流程。
展望2025年，随着 AI技术在游戏开发流程中的深度应用，游艺春秋判断产品的迭代速度将会加快，但同时也对产品的底层设计与核心乐
趣提出了更高的要求。高效的前期玩法验证，将成为发行商在全球市场竞争中的新护城河。它不仅能有效降低产品的“暴死率”，更能确
保有限的研发资源投入到真正具备爆款潜力的赛道上。在出海市场持续扩容、区域性机会不断涌现的当下，一个经过数据验证的强大核
心玩法，是我们在全球市场稳健前行、实现可持续增长的基石，也希望新的一年，各位同行都能在业内取得好成绩。
19
TOP GLOBAL MOBILE GAMES OF 2025

message.content:
This section answers retrieval questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Strategies for succeeding in the 2025 global mobile game market; the shift toward high-quality, high-cost, saturated competition ("存量博弈"); industry trends in genre fusion, thematic differentiation, and AI-driven development acceleration.
- **Entities:** 游艺春秋 (Youyi Chunqiu); SLG and RPG game genres; global mobile game market and regional expansion opportunities.
- **Dates/Timeframes:** 2025 market outlook and strategic planning; early-stage product立项 (project initiation) phase.
- **Definitions & Concepts:** “前期玩法验证测试” (early gameplay validation testing); “最小可行产品” (MVP); “核心循环” (core gameplay loop); “暴死率” (product failure rate); data-driven validation as a competitive moat.
- **Procedures & Workflows:** Pre-development validation steps: isolate core gameplay logic, develop a lightweight/minigame MVP, conduct small-scale market tests, iterate rapidly, prioritize retention tracking, and collect authentic user feedback before scaling art/content production.
- **Claims & Strategic Assertions:** Early gameplay validation is the most critical decision for modern game development; it significantly reduces failure rates, prevents wasteful spending on unproven concepts, and ensures R&D resources target commercially viable projects. A data-validated core loop is the foundation for sustainable global growth and market competitiveness.
- **Metrics:** User retention rates, commercialization potential, development cost benchmarks (tens of millions of USD for heavy genres), and iteration speed.
- **Evidence Types:** Industry trend analysis, market observation, data-driven validation logic, and strategic reasoning. No specific tables or figures are referenced in this text.
- **Document Context:** Part of a broader analysis on “TOP GLOBAL MOBILE GAMES OF 2025.”

- **Topics:** Strategies for succeeding in the 2025 global mobile game market; the shift toward high-quality, high-cost, saturated competition ("存量博弈"); industry trends in genre fusion, thematic differentiation, and AI-driven development acceleration.
- **Entities:** 游艺春秋 (Youyi Chunqiu); SLG and RPG game genres; global mobile game market and regional expansion opportunities.

- **Procedures & Workflows:** Pre-development validation steps: isolate core gameplay logic, develop a lightweight/minigame MVP, conduct small-scale market tests, iterate rapidly, prioritize retention tracking, and collect authentic user feedback before scaling art/content production.
- **Claims & Strategic Assertions:** Early gameplay validation is the most critical decision for modern game development; it significantly reduces failure rates, prevents wasteful spending on unproven concepts, and ensures R&D resources target commercially viable projects. A data-validated core loop is the foundation for sustainable global growth and market competitiveness.
- **Metrics:** User retention rates, commercialization potential, development cost benchmarks (tens of millions of USD for heavy genres), and iteration speed.
- **Evidence Types:** Industry trend analysis, market observation, data-driven validation logic, and strategic reasoning. No specific tables or figures are referenced in this text.
- **Document Context:** Part of a broader analysis on “TOP GLOBAL MOBILE GAMES OF 2025.”
